name: Clarus Corp
summary: Clarus Corporation is a global designer, developer, manufacturer, and distributor of outdoor equipment and lifestyle products headquartered in Salt Lake City, Utah. The company operates through Outdoor and Adventure segments, selling products under the Black Diamond (climbing, skiing, mountain sports), Rhino-Rack (automotive roof racks), MAXTRAX (vehicle recovery tracks), TRED (off-road recovery gear), and RockyMounts (bicycle racks) brand names through specialty retailers, online channels, distributors, and OEMs worldwide.

products.name: Black Diamond Equipment
products.description: High-performance climbing, skiing, and mountain sports equipment including gear and apparel for outdoor enthusiasts.

products.name: Rhino-Rack
products.description: Aftermarket automotive roof racks, luggage carriers, shade awnings, kayak carriers, bike carriers, and load-securing accessories.

products.name: MAXTRAX
products.description: Vehicle recovery and extraction tracks, including the MAXTRAX MKII, manufactured in Australia from fiber-reinforced nylon.

products.name: TRED
products.description: High-quality outdoor and recovery gear for offroad, 4x4 automotive touring, camping and caravanning markets, made in Australia.

products.name: RockyMounts
products.description: Premium bicycle racks and accessories including roof and hitch rack solutions compatible with SUVs, vans, and trucks.
